summary: Surface real solver quality breakdown (HC1-HC6 / SC1-SC10 / MIN_PERT) to admin scheduler UI via additive scoreBreakdown sub-object in resultSnapshot, with full backwards compatibility for legacy runs.

resultSnapshotAnalysis.oldRunBehavior: scoreBreakdown=null; readSnapshotBreakdown returns null; UI shows '旧运行无 breakdown 数据' placeholder card; no crash, no warning toast
resultSnapshotAnalysis.scope: Only new preview runs created AFTER L2 deployment persist scoreBreakdown. Old runs (created before L2) keep their original resultSnapshot shape and render fallback.

whatIsPersisted: Constraint stat array for 16 constraints (HC1-HC6, SC1-SC4, SC6-SC10, MIN_PERT)
Per-constraint topExamples (up to 5 message samples each)
Pre-computed top issues (max 20, sorted by severity then |penalty|)
hardScore / softScore / totalDetails counts for BEFORE and AFTER
whatIsNotPersisted: Per-slot delta history (too large; would exceed TEXT field limits)
Original ScheduleSlot placements (already in SchedulerRunChange table)
Run creation metadata (already in SchedulingRun columns)
previewBoundaries.persistenceTrigger: createSchedulerPreview is called on every POST /api/admin/scheduler/preview; new runs auto-persist scoreBreakdown
previewBoundaries.size: Approximately 5-15 KB per run depending on trigger counts

components.purpose: Render score summary, 8 business cards, constraint table, top issues with BEFORE/AFTER tab
components.fallbackBehavior: null breakdown → '旧运行无 breakdown 数据' card; malformed wire → 'breakdown 数据格式异常' error card

apiChanges.behavior: For old runs (no scoreBreakdown sub-object in resultSnapshot), readSnapshotBreakdown() returns null and the field is null in the response. UI tolerates this with fallback message.

uiIntegration.where: Inside <RunDetailView> after the existing ScoreCard comparison row
Inside the live preview result panel after Block Reasons

changes: Added ResultSnapshotScoreBreakdown field to PreviewResult interface
Computed beforeBreakdown / afterBreakdown right after bestDetails is calculated
Added scoreBreakdown sub-object to JSON.stringify({...}) for resultSnapshot
Added scoreBreakdown to PreviewResult return value

legacyFallback.oldRunWithoutScoreBreakdown: UI shows '旧运行无 breakdown 数据。该 run 在 K22-L2 实施前创建，未持久化每约束详情。' placeholder card; no crash, no error
legacyFallback.invalidSnapshotJson: readSnapshotBreakdown try-catch returns null; UI uses placeholder
legacyFallback.nullSnapshot: readSnapshotBreakdown returns null; UI uses placeholder
legacyFallback.wireFieldTypeMismatch: readPersistedBreakdown validates field types and returns null on mismatch; UI uses placeholder
legacyFallback.scopeOfBackwardsCompat: All SchedulingRun rows where resultSnapshot lacks scoreBreakdown sub-object, regardless of age or semester

k22CSnapshotByproduct.inL2Commit: K22-C harness was re-run during L2 verification, regenerated generatedAt timestamp in both files
k22CSnapshotByproduct.inL2ACommit: Reverted to L1 canonical state. K22-C harness re-runs are unrelated to L2 breakdown UI. The drift was pure byproduct (generatedAt only); reverting it removes non-essential K22-C artifact drift from the L2A commit.

l1EvaluationByproduct.inL2ACommit: L1 evaluation was run as part of L2A verification (per L2A spec). Output JSON updated with new timestamp + new elapsedMs (real timing). This is the L2A regression evidence, kept and committed.

regeneratedHardScoreSoftScore.softScore: -1281 (unchanged from L1 baseline; deterministic with randomSeed=42)

stageClosure.k22L2FinalState: scoreBreakdown UI shipped, fully verified, no outstanding gaps

recommendedNextStage: K22-PAUSE-REAL-USAGE-TRIAL: stop further K22 mechanical stages; transition to real-world usage validation by the academic scheduling office. Optional follow-ups: K22-L3 (CI regression), K22-L1B (soft weight tuning), K22-I (weights config).
